TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Willem-Alexander ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 4, Willem-Alexander, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Netherlands ta' misuw hya' ga Willem-Alexander, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: willem-alexan*er rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, willem-alexan*er, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw netńßerlan*s~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a willem-alexan*er, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Willem-Alexander ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 4, Willem-Alexander, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1967) mrhuw Netherlands ta' misuw hya' ga Willem-Alexander, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
